subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the Most Exalted, the All-Highest, from that court wherein is established the throne of thy Lord, the Most High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد ان استمع ندا ربک العلی الاعلی من شطر الذی فیه استقر عرش ربک العلی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @presence of; reunion with God
